title: Test behavior with an expired password reset link
description: Verify that a password reset link is invalid after its 1-hour expiration time and the user is prompted to request a new one.
preconditions: User has requested a password reset link

steps.description: 1. Request a password reset link for a valid account
3. Click the expired password reset link from the email
4. Attempt to enter a new password

expected_result: The user is navigated to a page indicating the link has expired. An error message is displayed, and the user is given an option to request a new password reset link. The API should return an 'INVALID_TOKEN' error.
